p2.title: CP00-053 evidence pack not yet created during Claude review
p2.issue: Claude requested changes because the reviewed diff intentionally did not yet include the CP00-053 pack evidence files required by the RP00 validator.
p2.recommendation: Create manifest, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection; then rerun RP00 and closeout pack validators.
p2.adjudication: Resolved by this CP00-053 evidence pack and final validation commands.

p3.title: Closeout Next Handoff result validator should reject incoherent allow/deny completion triplets
p3.adjudication: Fixed by enforcing allow_metadata_only implies completion true with lock_not_acquired_metadata_boundary_only and ready transition, while deny_cross_tenant_boundary implies completion false with blocked lock and handoff decisions; tests cover both drift cases.

p3.title: requested_pack_id intentionally lags pack_id/planned_pack_id
p3.adjudication: Confirmed. CP00-053 plan records requested_pack_id CP00-052 with correction_reason shifted to CP00-053 by live sequential cursor; this is provenance for the locked queue shift after CP00-052 was already closed, not a deviation.

p3.title: Module no-write flag set omits audit-ledger flags carried by policy
p3.adjudication: Fixed by adding doesNotAppendAuditLedger and doesNotWriteAuditEvent to the CP00-053 module and asserting them in tests and RP00 validator.

p3.title: Misleading nested-ternary indentation in construction-inspection subphase mapping
p3.adjudication: Fixed by replacing the nested ternary with an explicit if/else-if chain.

boundary_checks.no_review_queue: PASS - review queue, assignment, and notification writes are false
boundary_checks.no_service_logic_execution: PASS - assembler returns frozen metadata only
boundary_checks.no_real_data: PASS - synthetic fixture and no credentials/secrets
boundary_checks.fail_closed: PASS - entrypoint/source/model/evidence/gate drift and unsafe claims throw; cross-tenant drift is denied metadata
boundary_checks.plan_binding: PASS - planned/actual pack CP00-053, requested provenance CP00-052, Risk A, 4 units
boundary_checks.handoff: PASS - RP00.P02 handoff completes and next_subphase is RP00.P03.M00.S01

parsed_review.recommendation: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS. No unresolved P0/P1/P2 findings remain after evidence creation and P3 hardening/adjudication.
